player_notes.austin reaves: OUT for remainder of regular season with a Grade 2 left oblique injury. Significant minutes and usage shift for remaining Lakers games.
player_notes.luka doncic: Injury timeline uncertain per league insiders; return status unclear. Lakers rotation heavily impacted with both Doncic and Reaves unavailable.
player_notes.giannis antetokounmpo: Being held out by Bucks despite claiming he is healthy; NBA investigating. Treat as OUT until official status changes — avoid all Giannis props.
player_notes.nikola vucevic: Returning from fractured right ring finger surgery; active for Sunday's Celtics vs. Raptors game. Monitor minutes restriction risk in first game back.
player_notes.cade cunningham: Out for Pistons; team has clinched East's top seed without him. Backup guards (Jenkins) seeing elevated usage — Jenkins posted 16 pts/14 ast vs PHI.

game_notes.BOS vs TOR: Vucevic returning from finger surgery for Celtics; potential minutes restriction could affect rebounding props.
game_notes.MIL vs OPP: Giannis held out by Bucks despite self-reporting healthy; expect elevated usage for remaining Bucks rotation players.
